### Your current environment

The commit id or version of vllm-omni ```text ddba6de2ab658a0fdb6f3f72cac9d2c3e2c19aea ```
### 🐛 Describe the bug https://buildkite.com/vllm/vllm-omni/builds/12074/canvas?sid=019f32cc-ec98-4269-8ec8-fbd915f2e962&tab=output ``` ________________________________________________________________ test_multistage_sleep_h100[1] _________________________________________________________________ --   |     | tp_size = 1   |     | @pytest.mark.omni   | @pytest.mark.advanced_model   | @pytest.mark.parametrize("tp_size", [1, 2])   | @hardware_test(res={"cuda": "H100", "rocm": "MI325"}, num_cards=2)   | @pytest.mark.asyncio   | async def test_multistage_sleep_h100(tp_size: int):   | """Explicit 2-stage (llm + diffusion) + connectors; sleep/wake both stages."""   | if current_omni_platform.is_rocm():   | clean_gpu_envs()   | num_gpus = torch.accelerator.device_count()   | if num_gpus < tp_size * 2:   | pytest.skip("Not enough GPUs")   |     | stages = []   | for i in range(2):   | devs = get_dynamic_devices(i, 2, tp_size)   | stages.append(   | {   | "stage_id": i,   | "stage_type": "llm" if i == 0 else "diffusion",   | "runtime": {"process": True, "devices": devs},   | "engine_args": {   | "model": MODEL,   | "model_stage": "thinker" if i == 0 else "base",   | "tensor_parallel_size": tp_size,   | "gpu_memory_utilization": 0.4,   | "dtype": "bfloat16",   | "enable_sleep_mode": True,   | "trust_remote_code": True,   | },   | }   | )   |     | connectors = [{"src_stage_id": 0, "dst_stage_id": 1, "connector_type": "queue"}]   |     | engine = AsyncOmni(   | model=MODEL, stages=stages, connectors=connectors, enable_sleep_mode=True, stage_init_timeout=1200   | )   | try:   | sp = OmniDiffusionSamplingParams(num_inference_steps=2)   | async for _ in engine.generate("warmup", sampling_params_list=[SamplingParams(), sp]):   | pass   |     | acks = await engine.sleep(stage_ids=[0, 1], level=2)   | assert len(acks) == 2   |     | > await engine.wake_up(stage_ids=[0, 1])   |     | tests/entrypoints/test_omni_sleep_mode.py:547:   | _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _   |     | self = , stage_ids = [0, 1], tags = None   |     | async def wake_up(self, stage_ids: list[int] \| None = None, tags: list[str] \| None = None) -> list[OmniACK]:   | self._final_output_handler()   |     | if getattr(self, "_level2_sleeping", False):   | > raise NotImplementedError(   | "wake_up() after sleep(level=2) is not yet implemented: weights were "   | "discarded from GPU and reloading fro

comments.author: yenuo26
comments.body: @Flink-ddd please check it, when #4834 was merged, this error appeared.

comments.author: Flink-ddd
comments.body:
> [@Flink-ddd](https://github.com/Flink-ddd) please check it, when [#4834](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-omni/pull/4834) was merged, this error appeared.

Hi @yenuo26 , Please help me trigger a full sleep mode test on the CI cluster. The file is: tests/entrypoints/test_omni_sleep_mode.py. Thank you.

title: [Bug]: Merge CI, tests/entrypoints/test_omni_sleep_mode.py::TestOmniSleepMode, NotImplementedError: wake_up() after sleep(level=2) is not yet implemented: weights were discarded from GPU and reloading from disk is not yet supported.
